serverInfo.name: invinoveritas
serverInfo.description: Lightning-paid AI reasoning and decision intelligence for autonomous agents using Bitcoin Lightning (L402)
serverInfo.author: invinoveritas team

tools.name: reason
tools.description: Get deep strategic reasoning and analysis. Requires Lightning payment via L402.

tools.name: decide
tools.description: Get structured decision intelligence with confidence score and risk assessment. Requires Lightning payment.

authentication.description: Use Authorization: Bearer ivv_... (recommended for agents) or L402 <hash>:<preimage>

walletSetup.message: ⚡ Lightning wallet configuration is REQUIRED for autonomous operation.
walletSetup.note: Agents without a configured wallet (NWC or LND) will receive Payment Required (402) on every tool call.
walletSetup.quickstart: Use NWCProvider with WalletConnect URI from Alby, Zeus or Mutiny — setup takes under 3 minutes.

pricing.note: Final price may vary slightly based on input length and complexity.

importantNotes: Lightning wallet (NWC or LND) must be configured before using this MCP server.
Without a wallet, every callTool returns 402 Payment Required.
NWC is the fastest way to enable true autonomous agent behavior.
